summary: Validated deployment regression fix end-to-end: public /health is up (200), preview root/login/dashboard still load, backend startup/import path works, and full backend suite remains green.

ui_bugs.issue: Password input and Authenticate button still do not expose data-testid attributes, reducing selector stability for long-term automation.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid attributes on login input/button for stable UI automation.
critical_code_review_comments: Health endpoint implementation is deployment-safe: no forced DB connect and returns deterministic probe payload.
Startup/import path is stable via backend/server.py -> app.main import, and full suite confirms no regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression validated on preview URL https://33b5141b-c4f0-4d63-b740-5a43a3fe6f13.preview.emergentagent.com and public backend URL from frontend/.env. /health returns 200 on both and full pytest suite at /app/tests is green.
rca of the issue: Original deployment failure was consistent with missing public /health route (probe 404). Current implementation resolves this by exposing unauthenticated /health with cache-disabled response and non-blocking Mongo status reporting.
